beats.prompt: Adding 'think step by step before answering' forces the model to put its work on paper before committing to the answer. The intermediate tokens — the reasoning
beats.label: Adding 'think step by step before answering' forces the model to put its work on paper before commit

beats.prompt: Chain-of-thought helps with multi-step math, logic puzzles, and complex code. It hurts simple lookups: adding five hundred tokens of reasoning to a yes/no quest
beats.label: Chain-of-thought helps with multi-step math, logic puzzles, and complex code. It hurts simple lookup
